message:
feat(ui): add UTF-8 safe string truncation and improve time formatting

Add critical utility functions for proper text handling in the TUI:

truncateRunesHelper():
- New function that truncates strings by rune count, not byte count
- Properly handles multi-byte UTF-8 characters (emojis, CJK, etc.)
- Appends configurable suffix (e.g., "…") when truncation occurs
- Handles edge cases: empty strings, maxRunes <= 0, suffix longer than max
- Essential for correct display width calculations in terminal UI

FormatTimeRel() improvements:
- Add "now" for times less than 1 minute ago
- Add week ("Xw ago") and month ("Xmo ago") relative formats
- Use switch statement for cleaner code structure
- Provides better UX for older items in the list

BuildDependencyTree() improvements:
- Add maxDepth parameter to prevent infinite recursion in cyclic graphs
- Add visited map to detect and handle cycles gracefully
- Extract recursive logic to buildTreeRecursive() helper
- Improve documentation with usage guidance
- More robust handling of missing issues in the map

These utilities are used extensively by the insights dashboard and
main list view for proper text display and dependency visualization.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
